data.title: IBM’s Quantum Leap Revives Bitcoin Security Debate
data.description:
Catenaa, Saturday, June 21, 2025- IBM’s unveiling of a fault-tolerant quantum computer, set for rollout by 2029, is raising new concerns over Bitcoin’s long-term security and the viability of current cryptographic systems. The project, known as IBM Quantum Starling, is expected to operate with 200 error-corrected qubits and execute up to 100 million quantum operations. […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/ibms-quantum-leap-revives-bitcoin-security-debate

data.title: Nasdaq approves blockchain ASIC chip developer AGM Group's request to continue listing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AGM Group, a blockchain ASIC chip R&D listed company, announced that it has received a compliance letter from Nasdaq, notifying the company that it has met the purchase price requirements under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550 (a) (2), and therefore approved its request to continue to be listed on the Nasdaq capital market. According to previous news, AGM Group received a delisting notice from Nasdaq in April this year, and AGM Group subsequently filed an appeal. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-06-21)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.28T, up by 0.68% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $102,345 and $106,172 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $103,750, down by -1.96%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include FUN, SEI, and USTC, up by 43%, 9%, and 8%, respectively.

data.title: Litecoin, XRP and Solana ETF Applications Have 95% Chance of Approval This Year: Bloomberg Analysts
data.description:
Litecoin (LTC), XRP and Solana (SOL) exchange-traded fund (ETF) applications all have overwhelming odds of approval this year, according to Bloomberg ETF analysts. James Seyffart and Eric Balchunas now say on the social media platform X that those three altcoins have a 95% chance of securing ETFs in 2025.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/21/litecoin-xrp-and-solana-etf-applications-have-95-chance-of-approval-this-year-bloomberg-analysts/

data.description:

data.title: 1confirmation founder: If Ethereum is regarded as the "new America", Uniswap is equivalent to the New York Stock Exchange
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nick Tomaino, founder of 1confirmation, posted on the X platform that if Ethereum is regarded as the "new America", then the builders of the Ethereum ecosystem are the "founding fathers", Uniswap is equivalent to the New York Stock Exchange, Aave is equivalent to Bank of America, Polymarket is equivalent to the New York Times, Opensea and NFT project parties are equivalent to Disney, SuperRare is equivalent to MoMa, and Nexus Mutual is equivalent to State Farm.

data.title: DMC will be listed on Bitget Launchpool soon. Locking BGB or DMC will unlock 66.17 million DMC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Launchpool is about to launch the DeLorean (DMC) project, with a total prize pool of 66,176,000 DMCs. The lock-up channel will be open from 19:00 on June 24 to 19:00 on June 26 (UTC+8).
This round of Launchpool has two lock-up pools, including:
BGB lock-up pool
Total airdrop amount: 59,776,000 DMC
VIP user lock-up limit: 50,000 BGB
Ordinary user lock-up limit: 5,000 BGB
DMC lock-up pool
Total airdrop amount: 6,400,000 DMC
Lock-up limit: 60,000,000 DMC
In addition, the spot trading channels of RedBrick (BRIC) and DeLorean (DMC) will be opened at 18:00 on June 21 and 19:00 on June 24 (UTC+8).

data.title: Aptos was selected for the US WYST stablecoin project and ranked first in the selection score
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Wyoming Stable Token Commission recently announced that Aptos received the highest score in the selection of WYST blockchain platforms, the first stablecoin issued by the US state government and backed by fiat currency, and tied for first place with Solana.
WYST will achieve cross-chain deployment through LayerZero to build a new financial infrastructure for multi-chain interoperability.
Aptos natively supports three US dollar stablecoins, with an average monthly stablecoin transaction volume exceeding US$30 billion, and has a sub-second final confirmation speed and a nearly zero-cost (≈US$0.00055) transaction experience.
